draft_message: Community update: We're experiencing some elevated particulate matter levels in the downtown corridor. We are monitoring conditions and will share details as they develop. Please consider general precautions if you are sensitive.

Heads-up for Oak Park residents: particulate concentrations have been variable this week, and some monitors indicate conditions that may not be ideal. We'll continue to watch the situation; stay tuned for more information.
River Bend air quality update: our instruments show readings that may be of concern at times. We're working with partners and will communicate further context later. Exercise caution as you see fit.
